task: I need to text my supervisor that I can cover part of a shift but not the whole thing. Can you draft it in a way that’s clear and ready to send, without making it sound too stiff?

turns.agent_response:
Sure — here’s a clear, text-ready version:

**Hi [Supervisor Name], I can cover part of the shift, but I won’t be able to stay for the whole thing. Wanted to let you know as early as I can.**

If you want, I can also make it:
- a little more casual
- a little more professional
- or shorter, like a quick text message

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. It’s clear and not all stiff. I can use that.
